---
title: "Holly Pickett"
sortby: "Pickett Holly" # Note it is SURNAME first!
subtitle: "PhD student - Habitat use of Antarctic seabirds"
image: holly_pickett.png # name this file as name_surname.png, same prefix as this file; this should be a square image 250px by 250px
toc: false
# gscholar_id: "YOUR_ID" # replace this wiht your id and uncomment
group_start: "2025"
papers_name: "H Pickett" # if you have multiple names in papers, separated them by semicolon


#resources: 
#  - "NAME_SURNAME_cv.pdf" #optional, if you want to share your CV
about:
  id: person-profile
  template: jolla
  links:  # this are optional, use the ones that you are interested in (you need at least one, or you need to commone out this line as well)
    - icon: link
      text: Dept. of Zoology, Cambridge
      href: https://www.zoo.cam.ac.uk
#   - icon: file-earmark-text
#     text: vitae
#     href: ./people/NAME_SURNAME_cv.pdf
#    - icon: mortarboard
#      text: GScholar
#      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_ID&hl=en
#    - icon: linkedin
#      text: LinkedIn
#      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/YOUR_ID
#    - icon: twitter
#      text: twitter
#      href: https://www.twitter.com/YOUR_ID
#    - text: "{{< fa brands bluesky >}} BlueSky"
#      href: https://bsky.app/profile/YOUR_ID

---

:::{#person-profile}
:::


I am a PhD student at the Department and the British Antarctic Survey, supervised by Andrea Manica and Richard Phillips. My research focuses on Tracking pelagic seabirds of the Southern Ocean to understand variability in habitat use and diversity.
